No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to health, well-being, or related medical/public health topics.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and trains students in independent research and thesis writing, developing relevant skills for employment and entrepreneurship (Target 4.4).
evidence: 訓練學生獨立研究及撰寫碩士論文能力
引導學生如何選擇學術論文題目、建立理論或／與實證模型

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops skills for productive employment (Target 8.5) and covers 'Economic Regulation' (經濟管制), which supports policies for higher economic productivity (Target 8.2).
evidence: 訓練學生獨立研究及撰寫碩士論文能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly enhances scientific research and innovation capacity (Target 9.5) by teaching students to 'establish theoretical and/or empirical models' and conduct independent research.
evidence: 建立理論或／與實證模型

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The topic 'Economic Regulation' (經濟管制) can be applied to policies for achieving greater equality (Target 10.4), representing an inferred but valid connection.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to urban development, housing, or sustainable communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to sustainable consumption, resource efficiency, or waste reduction.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or related policies.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or deforestation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The topic 'Economic Regulation' (經濟管制) relates to developing effective institutions (Target 16.6). 'Respect Copyright' (維護智慧財產權) supports the rule of law (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course builds capacity for data analysis (Target 17.19) through 'data collection' and using 'computer statistical software', essential for measuring SDG progress.
evidence: 利用電腦統計軟體評估及修正模型
